MINI MINUTES: This cause came to trial on Nov. 6, 2002, Dept. 604, before Judge Ballati.Plntf. appearing in person, Deft. appearing through Todd M Foster,Esq. and evidence having been introduced. AGAINST Defendant. Edmond Shiu Kung Shey.
